scoring_hand_only.title: Only cards in the scoring poker hand score
scoring_hand_only.rule: Balatro first identifies the best poker hand among the played cards, stores that subset as scoring_hand, and then evaluates card chips, enhancements, seals, edition effects, and many Joker checks against that scoring_hand. Extra played kickers outside the selected poker hand usually do not score and do not trigger their card scoring effects.

held_in_hand_effects.title: Held-in-hand effects come from cards left in hand
held_in_hand_effects.rule: After scoring played cards, the game separately evaluates cards still in G.hand for held-in-hand effects. This is why Steel Card style value is usually obtained by not playing the card.

glass_scores_and_breaks_only_when_scorin.title: Glass value and break risk are tied to scoring cards
glass_scores_and_breaks_only_when_scorin.rule: Glass Card evaluation and the later shatter check both iterate the scoring_hand, not all played cards.

the_fool_copies_last_tarot_or_planet.title: The Fool copies the last Tarot or Planet used
the_fool_copies_last_tarot_or_planet.rule: The game records the most recently used Tarot or Planet in G.GAME.last_tarot_planet. The Fool is usable only when that stored card exists and is not The Fool, then creates that stored Tarot or Planet.

death_uses_rightmost_selected_card_as_ta.title: Death converts selected cards into the rightmost selected card
death_uses_rightmost_selected_card_as_ta.rule: Death finds the rightmost selected hand card by screen x-position, then copies that card onto every other selected card.

native_rank_and_suit_sort.title: Rank and suit sorting should use the game's native hand sort
native_rank_and_suit_sort.rule: Balatro's rank sort button calls G.hand:sort('desc'), and its suit sort button calls G.hand:sort('suit desc'). The CardArea sort implementation defines rank, suit, reverse, and order modes.

selling_can_be_relevant_during_pack_choi.title: Selling can free slots before choosing a booster reward
selling_can_be_relevant_during_pack_choi.rule: A card can be sold when the card itself permits selling and the controller is not locked. Selling a Joker also sends a selling_card context to the other Jokers. In practice, freeing a Joker or consumable slot can be necessary before selecting a pack reward.

cartomancer_needs_consumable_space.title: Cartomancer needs consumable capacity
cartomancer_needs_consumable_space.rule: Cartomancer creates a Tarot only when the consumable area plus the consumeable buffer is below the consumable card limit.

face_cards_are_jack_queen_king_unless_mo.title: Face cards are Jack, Queen, King unless modified
face_cards_are_jack_queen_king_unless_mo.rule: The game's face-card check returns true for ranks 11, 12, and 13, or when a modifier such as Pareidolia makes cards count as face cards. Ace is rank 14 but is not a face card by default.

jokers_are_limited_shared_build_slots.title: Jokers are limited shared build slots
jokers_are_limited_shared_build_slots.rule: Jokers are the main build-defining cards and occupy limited Joker slots; editions such as Negative can effectively add capacity, while Foil, Holographic, and Polychrome add score value.

booster_pack_rewards_are_free_picks.title: Booster pack contents are free picks after the pack is opened
booster_pack_rewards_are_free_picks.rule: After a booster pack is opened, the cards shown in the pack are choices from the already-paid pack reward, not shop offers that require paying their printed buy price again.
source: Balatro game rules: booster pack selection flow

tags_are_skip_rewards.title: Tags are rewards for skipping the shown Blind
tags_are_skip_rewards.rule: In blind selection, the tag UI is bound to the skip_blind action. When skip_blind runs, the game adds the displayed tag, marks the skipped blind as Skipped, and advances to the next blind. Playing and defeating that blind does not award the displayed tag.
